preamble_contract.title: Baseline Transport Contract
preamble_contract.central_thesis: Define the corpus-wide contract: every claim is a transported state with provenance, receipt, example, tool binding, and workbook representation.
preamble_contract.note: Paper 00 is outside the four active windows. It is the inherited minimum contract for information burden and method, not the body of work being enumerated.

edge_policy.suite_wrap: Paper 32 wraps to Paper 01 for active-suite retest; Paper 00 remains the inherited method contract outside the window.
edge_policy.block_wrap: Each 8-paper block has a local wrap from its last paper back to its first.
edge_policy.boundary_collision: A failed or partial edge is recorded as an obligation/correction surface, not erased.

required_components.label: Formal, Normal, Closed-Form Algebra and Calculus

blocks.title: Time, Receipts, Admission, Physics Interfaces, and Continuum Edges

papers.status: Formal refinement draft for peer-review-facing development
papers.block_title: First Carrier Chain Through Closure

papers.title: Hamiltonian Temporal Emergence
papers.status: Formal refinement draft for peer-review-facing development
papers.block_title: Time, Receipts, Admission, Physics Interfaces, and Continuum Edges
papers.central_thesis: Describe local inside global temporal emergence as Hamiltonian-window readout over transported states.

claims.primary_content: Hamiltonian temporal emergence is a finite local-window construction over carried centers. Width-3, width-5, and width-7 reads emit exactly four, three, and two surviving composite centers while preserving source indices, source centers, forward receipts, and backward receipts.
claims.required_action: Add separate physical-dynamics theorems only when Hamiltonian dynamics beyond receipt-level window emergence are claimed.

papers.title: T10 Master Receipt
papers.status: Formal refinement draft for peer-review-facing development
papers.block_title: Time, Receipts, Admission, Physics Interfaces, and Continuum Edges
papers.central_thesis: Bind Paper 00 and Papers 01-09 into a replayable master receipt carried from the observer's step-00 enumeration event into step 1, with typed transport rows, materialized lookup receipts, and visible open-lift boundaries.

claims.primary_content: The T10 master receipt proves the 00-09 substack is inspectable and replayable: Paper 00 is bound as the inherited contract and observer enumeration event, Papers 01-09 have pass-like formal receipts, transport rows are typed, local witnesses replay, and lookup receipts materialize.
claims.required_action: Receipt: production/formal-papers/CQE-paper-10/t10_master_receipt.json

math.primary_content: T10 = (C00, E00->1, P00, P01..P09, R, L, V, O), binding the observer center, initial encoding event, paper receipts, transport rows, lookup cache, verdict, and open-obligation set.
math.required_action: Verified result: status=pass; transport status=pass_with_open_lifts.

formal_algebra_calculus.primary_content: Receipt algebra requires the requested enumeration to become C00, C00 to be carried from Paper 00 into Paper 01 as E00->1, parseable paper receipts, required transport-row fields, and LookupReceipt outputs for cache reads.
formal_algebra_calculus.required_action: Preserve closed_form_claim=False for the Prize 3 lookup substrate.

hand_work.primary_content: By-hand reconstruction exposes paper bindings, rows, witnesses, and open-lift marks as supplemental validation.
hand_work.required_action: Keep workbook markings aligned with formal receipt fields.

code_rebuild.required_action: Re-run after changes to Papers 00-09 receipts, transport obligations, or lookup cache data.

lib_bindings.required_action: Packaged lib includes Rule 30 million-bit, UMRK, LMFDB, and Atlas data for cache materialization.

tests_and_receipts.primary_content: t10_master_receipt.json records positive checks and falsifiers for lift-overclaim, cold-start-overclaim, and unbound-paper entry.
tests_and_receipts.required_action: Training-mode hidden-guess ablation remains a kernel-level diagnostic policy applied to validation runs.

deployment_kernel.primary_content: Deployable individually as CQE-paper-10 and selectable through the master suite.
deployment_kernel.required_action: Expose paper, block, and suite selectors with no duplicate routing logic.
